LOGIN.TITLE: Welcome back
LOGIN.SUBTITLE: Sign in to your BidBattle account
LOGIN.ERROR_GENERIC: Invalid email or password. Please try again.

REGISTER.TITLE: Join BidBattle
REGISTER.SUBTITLE: Create a new account to start bidding
REGISTER.ERROR_GENERIC: An error occurred during registration. Please try again.
REGISTER.SUCCESS_MESSAGE: We have sent an activation link to your e-mail address. Check your inbox (and spam folder) and click the link to activate your account.

VALIDATION.EMAIL_INVALID: Please enter a valid email address.
VALIDATION.PASSWORD_MIN: Password must be at least 8 characters.
VALIDATION.PASSWORD_TOO_WEAK: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, one number, and one special character.

VERIFY_EMAIL.SUCCESS_MESSAGE: Your email address has been confirmed. You can now sign in.
VERIFY_EMAIL.ERROR_NO_TOKEN: Missing activation token. Use the link from your email.
VERIFY_EMAIL.ERROR_GENERIC: The activation link is invalid or has expired.
VERIFY_EMAIL.RESEND_HINT: You can request a new activation link:
VERIFY_EMAIL.RESEND_SUCCESS_MESSAGE: If an account exists for this email and is not yet active, we have sent a new activation link.
VERIFY_EMAIL.RESEND_ERROR_GENERIC: Could not send the activation link. Please try again.

FORGOT_PASSWORD.TITLE: Forgot your password?
FORGOT_PASSWORD.SUBTITLE: Enter the email associated with your account and we will send you a reset link.
FORGOT_PASSWORD.SUCCESS_MESSAGE: If an account exists for this email, we have sent a password reset link. Check your inbox (and spam folder).
FORGOT_PASSWORD.ERROR_GENERIC: Could not send the reset link. Please try again.

RESET_PASSWORD.TITLE: Set a new password
RESET_PASSWORD.SUBTITLE: Enter a new password for your account.
RESET_PASSWORD.SUBTITLE_NO_TOKEN: The reset link is invalid or has expired. Request a new link.
RESET_PASSWORD.SUCCESS_MESSAGE: Your password has been updated. You can now sign in.
RESET_PASSWORD.ERROR_GENERIC: Could not reset your password. Please try again or request a new link.
RESET_PASSWORD.ERROR_NO_TOKEN: Missing password reset token. Use the link from your email.

ERRORS.UNEXPECTED: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
